common.footerAutomated: This is an automated message from Colabora.
common.sentOnBehalfOf: Sent by Colabora on behalf of {{orgName}}.
common.copyLink: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:
common.expiresIn7Days: This invitation will expire in 7 days.
common.expiresIn1Hour: This link will expire in 1 hour.
common.ignoreIfUnexpected: If you did not expect this email, you can safely ignore it.
common.didNotRequest: If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email.

invitation.subject: Invitation to join {{orgName}} as a {{role}}
invitation.heading: You're invited!
invitation.body: {{inviterName}} has invited you to join {{orgName}} as a {{role}}.
invitation.roleMemberDescription: As a member, you can participate in discussions, proposals, and voting.
invitation.roleRepresentativeDescription: As a representative, you will have governance responsibilities and voting privileges.

documentInvitation.subject: Invitation to collaborate on "{{documentTitle}}"
documentInvitation.heading: You're invited to collaborate!
documentInvitation.body: {{inviterName}} has invited you to collaborate on the document "{{documentTitle}}".
documentInvitation.description: As a collaborator, you can view, comment on, and propose changes to this document.

welcome.subject: Welcome to {{orgName}}!
welcome.heading: Welcome!
welcome.body: Welcome to {{orgName}}! Your account has been successfully created.
welcome.description: You can now start collaborating, creating documents, and participating in governance activities.

firstUserWelcome.subject: Welcome to Colabora
firstUserWelcome.heading: Welcome to Colabora!
firstUserWelcome.body: Thank you for joining Colabora! We're excited to have you on the platform.
firstUserWelcome.expectBody: You'll receive an invitation email shortly to join an organization. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
firstUserWelcome.betaNote: Colabora is in active development. We appreciate your patience and feedback as we continue to improve.
firstUserWelcome.earlyAdopter: Thank you for being an early adopter!

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password
passwordReset.heading: Reset your password
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset your password for your Colabora account.
passwordReset.important: Important: This link will expire in 1 hour.

deadlineReminder.subject: Reminder: {{title}} — {{deadlineType}} approaching
deadlineReminder.heading: Deadline reminder
deadlineReminder.action: Please take action before the deadline passes.

votingStarted.subject: Voting has started: {{title}}
votingStarted.heading: Voting started
votingStarted.participation: Your participation is important. Please cast your vote before the deadline.

activityDigest.prefsNote: You can manage your notification preferences in your profile settings.

deadlinesDigest.preheader: Voting and elections ending in the next 7 days.
deadlinesDigest.heading: Deadlines this week
deadlinesDigest.intro: Here's what's coming up in the next 7 days.
deadlinesDigest.prefsNote: You're getting this because you have deadline reminders enabled.

representativeRejection.heading: Request declined
representativeRejection.bodyVote: A representative has declined your vote: "{{itemTitle}}"
representativeRejection.bodyProposal: A representative has declined your rule proposal: "{{itemTitle}}"
representativeRejection.retry: You may submit a new request or proposal if you wish to try again.
